PS1.shortInfo: Develop a dynamic portfolio platform for users to create, simulate, and track diverse portfolios with real-time data integration, investment strategies, and performance reporting.

PS2.shortInfo: Develop a user-friendly, multilingual interface similar to "Alexa/Hello Google" for farmers to easily access and consume curated agricultural information throughout the farming process.

PS3.shortInfo: The goal of this Problem statement is to develop an innovative, real-time voice assistant within the AI/ML domain

PS4.shortInfo: Develop an innovative solution using technology to accurately detect human posture and actions in real-time.

PS5.shortInfo: Breaking Barriers in Education: A Blockchain Solution to Democratize Learning

PS6.shortInfo: This open innovation challenge is designed to inspire the development of solutions that empower students by enhancing their access to placements and internships.
